chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D96 of 2019: Manzoor Ali Bugti vs. Director of Schools Education Larkana &others. For the Petitioner: Mr. Atta Hussain Chandio, Advocate For the Respondents: Mr.Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl A.G. Sindh. Dates of hearing: 23.02.2022 Date of announcement: 23.02.2022 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioner claims to have been engaged oncontract in 2012 for a period of three years, which has admittedly lapsed. The present petition has been filed seeking recovery of alleged contractual dues there under. It is settled law that the writ jurisdiction is not amenable for agitation of contractual disputes and even otherwise this petition is severely barred by laches, in respect whereof no cogent justification could be articulated.In view hereof this petition is found to misconceived, hence, dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
